response.justification: Bogdan has extensive backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and microservices, but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems in commercial fintech contexts. While his recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, it is unclear whether this meets the scale, regulatory, and financial-impact requirements of the role. Leadership experience is strong in team growth and engineering practices, but not specifically in fintech infrastructure or high-stakes AI deployments.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and real-time backend expertise (e.g., microservices, event-driven architectures)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and improving development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, model-agnostic frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with agentic AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains (credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lack of direct experience with real-time inference systems or financial optimization workflows
